title: Project Manager
required_skills: Project management experience in software/digital environments
Agile ceremonies facilitation (sprint planning, standups, retrospectives)
Project management tools (Jira, ClickUp, Asana, Trello, Monday.com)
matched_skills: Agile sprint coordination: Hapag-Lloyd — participated in sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives; coordinated cross-functional deliverables across agile sprints
Cross-functional team coordination: HSBC — managed programme status across 6 workstreams spanning Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite
Stakeholder communication: HSBC — C-suite reporting; Hapag-Lloyd — executive sprint review reports escalated to senior stakeholders
Risk escalation and prioritisation: HSBC PMO — risk escalation and prioritisation decisions
JIRA proficiency: certified tool user (listed in CV tools)
Agile delivery: Scrum ceremonies participation at Hapag-Lloyd
missing_skills: Formal software project management (end-to-end ownership of software delivery projects)
ClickUp / Asana / Monday.com experience (only Jira confirmed)
core_responsibilities: Lead end-to-end project delivery across web, desktop, mobile, and platform-based applications
Build and manage project plans, sprint schedules, delivery roadmaps, and status reports
Coordinate cross-functional teams (Product, Engineering, Design, QA, Data, external partners)
Facilitate Agile ceremonies and collaborative working sessions
Identify and manage risks, dependencies, blockers, and scope changes
Monitor project health, delivery velocity, and team progress
Drive accountability while fostering collaborative team environment
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Hapag-Lloyd sprint coordination role: central coordination point between project teams, stakeholders, and product owners — directly maps to Agile PM duties
HSBC 6-workstream programme management as evidence of cross-functional coordination at scale
JIRA proficiency (listed tool) — emphasise hands-on use for agile delivery tracking
Risk escalation and prioritisation at HSBC PMO as evidence of proactive blocker management
Executive reporting capability as stakeholder communication strength
summary: Score 72.5 (moderate match). Boru has strong agile coordination, cross-functional stakeholder management, and JIRA experience — all core to this role. The main gap is lack of explicit end-to-end software project ownership (Boru's PM experience is in coordination/PMO support rather than lead PM of software releases). Recommend applying with emphasis on Hapag-Lloyd agile delivery and HSBC multi-workstream programme governance; acknowledge the transition from PMO/coordination to full PM ownership in the cover letter.
